"use strict"; Object.defineProperty(exports, Symbol.toStringTag, { value: "Module" }); const useMatch = require("./useMatch.cjs"); function useRouteContext(opts) { return useMatch.useMatch({ ...opts, select: (match) => opts.select ? opts.select(match.context) : match.context }); } exports.useRouteContext = useRouteContext; //# sourceMappingURL=useRouteContext.cjs.map
